arms.A0: published C_full W7 baseline under artifact_channel off

artifact_channel_registry.recorded_observable: declared_mass_by_step is recorded for every non-off arm as adoption dynamics; it is not a hypothesis threshold.

referee_side_verification_and_policy.audit_only_field_rule: No catastrophe or audit-only fields may be referenced in policy or verification code. Lower false containment is a hypothesis, not a branch condition.
referee_side_verification_and_policy.description: Conformance and C_full_artifacts policy read only existing Obs fields plus declarations; they are included in the same leakage scan as earlier gates.

world_side_emission.description: Declaration emission is agent/world behavior, analogous to extraction or migration; it may read strategy fields and is not part of the referee leakage scan.
world_side_emission.initial_conditions: declaration_propensity starts at 0.0 in every strategy template; adoption must arise by mutation/selection, not initialization.

metadata.mode: prospective held-out W7 revenge; outcome citable under any result
metadata.question: Does verified artifact conformance reduce the J-N3 W7 specificity failure without editing W7?
metadata.seed_policy_rationale_guard_9: W8 uses fresh non-overlapping seed blocks: J-N5 owns 21000-21023 and J-N5b owns 22000-22023; earlier harnessed gates used 16000/17000/18000/19000/20000 blocks.
metadata.world_reuse_contract: Import W7HeldoutModel and W7_WORLD from experiments.harnessed.J_N3_heldout_W7.run_j_n3; no copy and no world edits.

threshold_change_rationale.arms: J-N5b is the W7 specificity replay with only A0 and A2; A1 trust-without-verification is tested in J-N5, not in held-out W7 revenge.
threshold_change_rationale.false_containment_ceiling: 0.20 is the J-N3 specificity ceiling and published viability bar.
threshold_change_rationale.permanence_tolerance: 0.12 follows published tolerance practice; H-C4 requires permanence >= 0.792 - 0.12 = 0.672.
threshold_change_rationale.seeds: W8 uses fresh non-overlapping seed blocks: J-N5 owns 21000-21023 and J-N5b owns 22000-22023; earlier harnessed gates used 16000/17000/18000/19000/20000 blocks.

thresholds.kill_condition: If J-N5 H-C1 FAILS and H-C4 FAILS, W8/corner is empty in this substrate.
